trigger: GitHub Actions Static source/resource audit failed at Stage153: infusion lookup must check component pedestals before selecting a recipe
fixed: InfusionMatrixBlockEntity.findMatchingOriginalInfusionRecipe now explicitly checks component pedestal matches before recipe selection; runic augmentation keeps catalyst-aware dynamic components.
Stage155 resolver audit now accepts Stage323+ canonical focus runtime ids after duplicate tc4_focus_* mirror cleanup instead of demanding the removed mirror ids.
ResearchTableContainerScreen restores a visible table bonus-aspect summary in the TC4 GUI adapter.

Stage211-215 audits no longer depend on /mnt/data-only extracted original TC4 source trees in GitHub CI; when originals are absent they validate carried source anchors, reports and actual 1.19.2 adapter files.
Stage211-215 version guards now accept the current Stage342 3.42.0 source instead of old 2.15/2.16 literals.
not_changed: No new TC4 mechanics, items, recipes, progression or textures were introduced by this hotfix.

Stage323 focus cleanup remains: active recipes use real focus_fire/focus_frost/focus_shock/focus_excavation/focus_equal_trade/focus_portable_hole/focus_warding/focus_primal ids; old focus mirrors remain quarantined except Hellbat placeholder.
gradle_build: Not run to completion in sandbox; wrapper still requires network/DNS for Gradle distribution if not cached.
